Joe Kent, the director of the National Counterterrorism Center, resigns over Iran war.

images.alt:
Joe Kent ~
@joekent16jan19
X.com
After much reflection, I have decided to resign from my position as Director of the National Counterterrorism Center, effective today.
I cannot in good conscience support the ongoing war in Iran. Iran posed no imminent threat to our nation, and it is clear that we started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby.
It has been an honor serving under @POTUS and @DNIGabbard and leading the professionals at NCTC.
May God bless America.

Director of National Intelligence
National Counterterrorism Center
President Trump,
After much reflection, I have decided to resign from my position as Director of the National Counterterrorism Center, effective today.
I cannot in good conscience support the ongoing war in Iran. Iran posed no imminent threat to our nation, and it is clear that we started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby.
I support the values and the foreign policies that you campaigned on in 2016, 2020, 2024, which you enacted in your first term. Until June of 2025, you understood that the wars in the Middle East were a trap that robbed America of the precious lives of our patriots and depleted the wealth and prosperity of our nation.
In your first administration, you understood better than any modern President how to decisively apply military power without getting us drawn into never-ending wars. You demonstrated this by killing Qasam Solamani and by defeating ISIS.
Early in this administration, high-ranking Israeli officials and influential members of the American media deployed a misinformation campaign that wholly undermined your America First platform and sowed pro-war sentiments to encourage a war with Iran. This echo chamber was used to deceive you into believing that Iran posed an imminent threat to the United States, and that should you strike now, there was a clear path to a swift victory. This was a lie and is the same tactic the Israelis used to draw us into the disastrous Iraq war that cost our nation the lives of thousands of our best men and women. We cannot make this mistake again.
As a veteran who deployed to combat 11 times and as a Gold Star husband who lost my beloved vife Shannon in a war manufactured by Israel, I cannot support sending the next generation of to fight and die in a war that serves no benefit to the American people nor justifies the cost of
I pray that you will reflect upon what we are doing in Iran, and who we are doing it for.…

Nordea will cut 1,500 jobs across the Nordics as AI, automation and restructuring drive its 2030 efficiency plan.

#nordics
#ai

external.description: Nordea job cuts will affect around 1,500 positions across the banking group in 2026 and 2027, as the Nordic lender moves ahead with a restructuring plan tied to its 2030 strategy. The bank said the cuts are linked to technology, data, AI and process optimisation, and will follow union negotiations and consultation processes. It did not specify which countries or business units will be affected. Nordea links job cuts to its 2030 strategy Nordea announced on Tuesday that it will book €190 million in restructuring costs in the first quarter of 2026 to implement changes designed to improve long-term efficiency.
external.title: Nordea says AI and efficiency will cut 1,500 jobs

record.text:
Siumut leaves Greenland’s government, but Nielsen keeps a majority as Vivian Motzfeldt’s exit deepens the crisis.

#greenland

external.description: Siumut has left Greenland’s coalition government, opening a new political crisis in Nuuk just as Greenland is trying to project unity under renewed pressure from the USA. The party’s withdrawal weakens the broad coalition led by Prime Minister (formanden for Naalakkersuisut) Jens-Frederik Nielsen, but it does not bring down the government: the remaining parties still hold a majority in Inatsisartut, Greenland’s parliament. Why Siumut walked out of the coalition Siumut announced on 13 March that it was leaving the four-party coalition after a dispute over two serving ministers who had entered the campaign for Denmark’s parliamentary election.
external.title: Siumut’s break with the government has opened a new crisis in Greenland

CAF Awards AFCON 2025 Title To Morocco After Senegal Forfeits Final

The Confederation of African Football Appeal Board has officially awarded the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations title to Morocco after ruling that Senegal forfeited the final match. The decision follows a successful appeal by the…

external.description: The Confederation of African Football Appeal Board has officially awarded the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations title to Morocco after ruling that Senegal forfeited the final match. The decision follows a successful appeal by the Fédération Royale Marocaine de Football which challenged an earlier ruling by CAF’s Disciplinary Board over incidents that occurred during the final. According to CAF, Senegal’s conduct breached Articles 82 and 84 of the competition regulations leading to the forfeiture of the match and a 3 0 victory awarded to Morocco.
external.title: CAF Awards AFCON 2025 Title To Morocco After Senegal Forfeits Final

원자력 발전 및 AI 전력망 투자 확대로 실적 가시성이 강화되고, 다양한 대형 수주도 이루어졌다.

장기적으로는 전력 인프라 수혜주로서의 가치가 기대된다.

external.description: ワールド・ベースボール・クラシック（WBC）の決勝戦は、ベネズエラが米国を3対2で破り、初優勝を果たしました。 ベネズエラは3回表にガルシアの中犠飛で先制し、5回表にはアブレイユがソロホームランを放ち2点リードを奪いました。 米国は8回裏にハーパーの2ランホームランで同点に追いつきましたが、9回表にベネズエラが勝ち越しに成功し、このまま逃げ切りました。 試合では、ベネズエラの先発Ed・ロドリゲスを含む投手陣が米国の打線を抑え、勝利に貢献しました。 一方、米国は8回にハーパーが起死回生の同点ホームランを放つも、9回裏は反撃できず、2大会連続の決勝戦で涙を呑みました。 ベネズエラは17年以来2大会ぶりとなるWBCの頂点に立ち、歓喜に沸きました。 両チームの投手陣は、マクリーン、ケラー、ベスト、ジャックス、ウィットロック、ロジャース（米国）と、Ed・ロドリゲス、バザード、ブット、セルパ、マチャド、パレンシア（ベネズエラ）がそれぞれマウンドに上がりました。

WBCのベネズエラ勝利は、ラテンアメリカ野球の新たな地平を切り開きました。
これまで、WBCは北米やカリブ海諸国が中心でしたが、ベネズエラの躍進は、ヨーロッパ勢の台頭と共に、野球のグローバル化を加速させるでしょう。

Der japanische Fernsehersender Fuji TV gab mit einem Visual und einem Trailer bekannt, dass der Manhua »Shang Shan« von  Jiang Jia Meizis eine Anime-Adaption  erhält. Diese soll im Laufe des nächsten Jahres 2027 im japanischen TV starten.

🎙️ Charaktere & Cast (Japanisch)
»Shōzen« von Rina Kawaguchi
»Dōzen« von Hiroshi Kamiya
»Ryojin« von Daisuke Sakuma
»Kensei« von Aoi Yūki
»Chiro« von Ayumu Murase

»Shang Shan« entsteht bei Dangan Pictures × Canon Records unter der Regie von Itsurō Kawasaki (The Demon Prince of Momochi House), der zudem das Drehbuch und die Soundregie übernimmt, das Character Design stammt von Eri Osada, die Art Direction liegt bei Takamasa Nakakuki und die Musik komponiert Takurō Iga (Oshi no Ko).

📜 Beschreibung 》
Der Daoist Dōzen reist als Wandermönch durch verschiedene Regionen, bis ihn eine ungewöhnliche Begegnung aus der Bahn wirft. Er trifft auf ein junges Mädchen, das von Yokai großgezogen wurde und deshalb kaum etwas von menschlichen Emotionen kennt. Für sie sind Zuneigung, Mitgefühl und Liebe fremde Konzepte. Dōzen entscheidet sich, ihr einen neuen Namen zu geben, Shōzen, und sie als Schülerin an seiner Seite aufzunehmen. Von diesem Moment an wird aus seiner Reise eine gemeinsame Pilgerfahrt. Unterwegs stellt er ihr Fragen, die einfach klingen, aber alles verändern: Was ist Güte. Was ist Liebe. Shōzen soll nicht nur Techniken lernen, sondern auch verstehen, wie man als Mensch fühlt und handelt. Mit jeder Station und jeder Begegnung beginnt sie, sich zu öffnen und ihre eigene Menschlichkeit zu entdecken. So wird die Reise zu einem stillen, aber intensiven Weg des Wachsens.

Üstelik bu benzerlik, yalnızca tasarımda değil, parçaların büyük ölçüde birbirine uyumlu olmasında da kendini gösteriyor. (for the record i currently don’t actually use AI for anything, i find it a crutch and feel it feeds the capital machine i don’t like, but i’ve also tried to be realistic that it is here and isn’t going away and that it has its uses in aiding users without outright replacing their labor output)

the technical need for the online stuff is for legacy systems and for enterprises to fund the big exploratory AI businesses that are making the LLMs, logging everyone’s data for marketing and otherwise just participating in capital growth, the same way you can’t work from home because Real Estate
